final:
module temp_shutdown_controller (
    input wire rst_clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [7:0] temperature,
    input wire [7:0] threshold,
    output reg shutdown
);
    
    always @(posedge rst_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            shutdown <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            if (temperature > threshold) begin
                shutdown <= 1'b1;
            end else begin
                shutdown <= 1'b0;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
